column9:
When setting up the business or therapy space, you should have separate offices for at least 2 mental health
professionals. In the office should be at least one living chair or loveseat and a couch. You must designate one of the
living chairs/loveseat/couch as Professional Seating for the Mental Health Professional. Do this in Live Mode by
clicking on that piece of furniture.
When loading the lot, if playing the Small Business owner Therapist, do not direct them to do any tasks. They will find
their seat and pull out their tablet to do work while they wait for patients all on their own.
For Reception desk there should be one The FRONT Desk and a computer on that desk. For small businesses, that
should be the only computer on the lot unless you want the receptionist to constantly change computers.
The simpler your setup is the better for the small business. You don't need to put things in for your sims to do while they
wait, etc. They will automatically attempt to sit down after checking in and occupy themselves on their own either with
a book or their phone or by knitting
